🏠 Warehouse Inventory
Master stock for this region

This is the permanent master inventory. Edit quantities to reflect current warehouse stock. Changes sync to Google Sheets.

Transfer to City
Enter quantities to move from warehouse

These quantities will be deducted from the warehouse and added to the city's starting inventory.

Return to Warehouse
Move unsold books back to warehouse

Enter quantities to return. City inventory will decrease, warehouse will increase.
